description: Dashboard for Elasticsearch cluster monitoring with OpenTelemetry elasticsearchreceiver metrics, covering cluster health, node performance, search and indexing activity, cache and breaker behavior, JVM health, and thread pools.
title: Elasticsearch Monitoring

cluster_name.name: cluster_name
cluster_name.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'elasticsearch.cluster.name')
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name='elasticsearch.cluster.health'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'elasticsearch.cluster.name') != ''
AND fingerprint GLOBAL IN
(
  SELECT DISTINCT fingerprint FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4
  WHERE metric_name='elasticsearch.cluster.health'
  AND unix_milli > toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) * 1000
)

node_name.name: node_name
node_name.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'elasticsearch.node.name')
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name='elasticsearch.node.operations.completed'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'elasticsearch.cluster.name')={{.cluster_name}}
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'elasticsearch.node.name') != ''
AND fingerprint GLOBAL IN
(
  SELECT DISTINCT fingerprint FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4
  WHERE metric_name='elasticsearch.node.operations.completed'
  AND unix_milli > toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) * 1000
)

index_name.name: index_name
index_name.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'elasticsearch.index.name')
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name='elasticsearch.index.operations.completed'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'elasticsearch.cluster.name')={{.cluster_name}}
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'elasticsearch.index.name') != ''
AND fingerprint GLOBAL IN
(
  SELECT DISTINCT fingerprint FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4
  WHERE metric_name='elasticsearch.index.operations.completed'
  AND unix_milli > toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) * 1000
)

thread_pool_name.name: thread_pool_name
thread_pool_name.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'thread_pool_name')
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name='elasticsearch.node.thread_pool.threads'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'elasticsearch.cluster.name')={{.cluster_name}}
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'thread_pool_name') != ''
AND fingerprint GLOBAL IN
(
  SELECT DISTINCT fingerprint FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4
  WHERE metric_name='elasticsearch.node.thread_pool.threads'
  AND unix_milli > toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) * 1000
)

widgets.description: Current cluster health status emitted by the receiver. The active status series is labeled green, yellow, or red.
widgets.title: Cluster Health Status

widgets.description: Total number of nodes in the selected Elasticsearch cluster.
widgets.title: Total Nodes

widgets.description: Number of data nodes in the selected Elasticsearch cluster.
widgets.title: Data Nodes

widgets.description: Count of active shards in the selected cluster.
widgets.title: Active Shards

widgets.description: Cluster-level changes that have not yet been executed.
widgets.title: Pending Tasks

widgets.description: Disk usage derived from total minus available disk space per node.
widgets.title: Disk Usage by Node

widgets.description: Disk space available to the JVM across all file stores for each node.
widgets.title: Disk Available by Node

widgets.description: Open file descriptors held by each Elasticsearch node.
widgets.title: Open File Descriptors

widgets.description: HTTP connections currently open to each Elasticsearch node.
widgets.title: HTTP Connections

widgets.description: Completed search operations per second by node. The receiver emits search work under operation=query.
widgets.title: Search Rate

filter.expression: elasticsearch.cluster.name = $cluster_name AND elasticsearch.node.name in $node_name AND operation = 'query'

widgets.description: Completed indexing operations per second by node.
widgets.title: Indexing Rate

filter.expression: elasticsearch.cluster.name = $cluster_name AND elasticsearch.node.name in $node_name AND operation = 'index'

widgets.description: Average time per search operation derived from operation time rate divided by completion rate.
widgets.title: Search Latency

filter.expression: elasticsearch.cluster.name = $cluster_name AND elasticsearch.node.name in $node_name AND operation = 'query'
elasticsearch.cluster.name = $cluster_name AND elasticsearch.node.name in $node_name AND operation = 'query'

widgets.description: Average time per indexing operation derived from operation time rate divided by completion rate.
widgets.title: Indexing Latency

filter.expression: elasticsearch.cluster.name = $cluster_name AND elasticsearch.node.name in $node_name AND operation = 'index'
elasticsearch.cluster.name = $cluster_name AND elasticsearch.node.name in $node_name AND operation = 'index'

widgets.description: Active document count reported by each node.
widgets.title: Document Count

filter.expression: elasticsearch.cluster.name = $cluster_name AND elasticsearch.node.name in $node_name AND state = 'active'

widgets.description: Cache memory usage across selected nodes grouped by cache name.
widgets.title: Cache Memory Usage

widgets.description: Cache evictions per second grouped by cache name.
widgets.title: Cache Evictions Rate

widgets.description: Estimated breaker memory usage grouped by circuit breaker name.
widgets.title: Circuit Breaker Memory Usage

widgets.description: Circuit breaker trip rate grouped by breaker name.
widgets.title: Circuit Breaker Trips

widgets.description: Heap memory used by each Elasticsearch node.
widgets.title: JVM Heap Usage

widgets.description: Heap usage percentage derived from used heap divided by max heap.
widgets.title: JVM Heap Usage %

widgets.description: Garbage collection count per second grouped by collector name.
widgets.title: GC Collection Rate

widgets.description: Average GC collection duration derived from elapsed time rate divided by collection rate.
widgets.title: GC Collection Duration

widgets.description: Thread pool threads grouped by thread pool name and state.
widgets.title: Thread Pool Threads

filter.expression: elasticsearch.cluster.name = $cluster_name AND elasticsearch.node.name in $node_name AND thread_pool_name in $thread_pool_name

widgets.description: Queued thread pool tasks grouped by thread pool name.
widgets.title: Thread Pool Queued Tasks

filter.expression: elasticsearch.cluster.name = $cluster_name AND elasticsearch.node.name in $node_name AND thread_pool_name in $thread_pool_name

widgets.description: Finished thread pool tasks per second grouped by thread pool name and task state.
widgets.title: Thread Pool Finished Tasks

filter.expression: elasticsearch.cluster.name = $cluster_name AND elasticsearch.node.name in $node_name AND thread_pool_name in $thread_pool_name
